TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Timur == u sulit nu Hulam: .Áî±Timor, Talavatsa, Salalau . i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Timur. u kasalumaluma' nu Timur sa, 498 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 1,728 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 1,640 ku tademaw, pakalatu 95%. u asip nu cidekay a tademaw u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 88 ku tademaw, pakalatu 5%. u niyazu' nu Paywan u kasabinacadan, Paywan(Paiwan) 80%, Rukay(Rukai) 9%, Tayan(Tayal) 1%, zumazuma 4%. 2 ku cacudadan i Timur niyzau'. 3 ku kyukay i Timur niyzau'. 1 ku pakincalan i Timur niyazu'. 1 ku pikuwanan i Timur niyzau'. 1 ku pacudacudadan i Timur niyazu'. 1 ku padekuan i Timur niyazu'. u cidekay nu Taywan a Incumin: u Sakizaya a binacadan azihan i u Pangcah(Amis) a binacadan azihan i u Tayal a binacadan azihan i u Paywan a binacadan azihan i u Bunun a binacadan azihan i u Piyuma a binacadan azihan i u Rukay a binacadan azihan i u Takuku a binacadan azihan i u Sejek a binacadan azihan i u Saysia a binacadan azihan i u Kabalan a binacadan azihan i u Kanakanabu a binacadan azihan i u Laaluwa a binacadan azihan i u Saw a binacadan azihan i u Chou a binacadan azihan i u Tau a binacadan azihan i
S.PHON: == timur == u sur~…æit nu ƒßur~…æam: .*timor, tar~…æa*atsa, sar~…æar~…æau . i pi≈ãtu≈ã a kuwan nu kar~…æinku ku nijazu î~ ° nu timur. u kasar~…æumar~…æuma î~ ° nu timur sa, *** ku r~…æuma î~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…æan sa, *,*** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…æan nu i≈ã ¶umin sa, *,*** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…æatu **%. u asip nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u zuma sa, ¶aj ku i≈ã ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…æatu *%. u nijazu î~ ° nu pajwan u kasabina ¶adan, pajwan(paiwan) **%, *ukaj(*ukai) *%, tajan(tajar~…æ) *%, zumazuma *%. * ku ¶a ¶udadan i timur nijzau î~ °. * ku kjukaj i timur nijzau î~ °. * ku pakin ¶ar~…æan i timur nijazu î~ °. * ku pikuwanan i timur nijzau î~ °. * ku pa ¶uda ¶udadan i timur nijazu î~ °. * ku pad…ôkuan i timur nijazu î~ °. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan a in ¶umin: u sakizaja a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u pa≈ã ¶aƒß(amis) a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u tajar~…æ a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u pajwan a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u bunun a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u pijuma a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u *ukaj a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u takuku a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u s…ôj…ôk a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u sajsia a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u kabar~…æan a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u kanakanabu a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u r~…æaar~…æuwa a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u saw a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u ¶ƒßou a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u tau a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i
S.FORM: == Timur == u sulit nu Hulam: .Áî±Timor, Talavatsa, Salalau . i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Timur. u kasalumaluma' nu Timur sa, 498 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 1,728 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 1,640 ku tademaw, pakalatu 95%. u asip nu cidekay a tademaw u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 88 ku tademaw, pakalatu 5%. u niyazu' nu Paywan u kasabinacadan, Paywan(Paiwan) 80%, Rukay(Rukai) 9%, Tayan(Tayal) 1%, zumazuma 4%. 2 ku cacudadan i Timur niyzau'. 3 ku kyukay i Timur niyzau'. 1 ku pakincalan i Timur niyazu'. 1 ku pikuwanan i Timur niyzau'. 1 ku pacudacudadan i Timur niyazu'. 1 ku padekuan i Timur niyazu'. u cidekay nu Taywan a Incumin: u Sakizaya a binacadan azihan i u Pangcah(Amis) a binacadan azihan i u Tayal a binacadan azihan i u Paywan a binacadan azihan i u Bunun a binacadan azihan i u Piyuma a binacadan azihan i u Rukay a binacadan azihan i u Takuku a binacadan azihan i u Sejek a binacadan azihan i u Saysia a binacadan azihan i u Kabalan a binacadan azihan i u Kanakanabu a binacadan azihan i u Laaluwa a binacadan azihan i u Saw a binacadan azihan i u Chou a binacadan azihan i u Tau a binacadan azihan i
S.PHON: == timur == u sur~…æit nu ƒßur~…æam: .*timor, tar~…æa*atsa, sar~…æar~…æau . i pi≈ãtu≈ã a kuwan nu kar~…æinku ku nijazu î~ ° nu timur. u kasar~…æumar~…æuma î~ ° nu timur sa, *** ku r~…æuma î~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…æan sa, *,*** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…æan nu i≈ã ¶umin sa, *,*** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…æatu **%. u asip nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u zuma sa, ¶aj ku i≈ã ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…æatu *%. u nijazu î~ ° nu pajwan u kasabina ¶adan, pajwan(paiwan) **%, *ukaj(*ukai) *%, tajan(tajar~…æ) *%, zumazuma *%. * ku ¶a ¶udadan i timur nijzau î~ °. * ku kjukaj i timur nijzau î~ °. * ku pakin ¶ar~…æan i timur nijazu î~ °. * ku pikuwanan i timur nijzau î~ °. * ku pa ¶uda ¶udadan i timur nijazu î~ °. * ku pad…ôkuan i timur nijazu î~ °. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan a in ¶umin: u sakizaja a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u pa≈ã ¶aƒß(amis) a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u tajar~…æ a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u pajwan a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u bunun a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u pijuma a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u *ukaj a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u takuku a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u s…ôj…ôk a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u sajsia a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u kabar~…æan a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u kanakanabu a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u r~…æaar~…æuwa a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u saw a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u ¶ƒßou a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i u tau a bina ¶adan aziƒßan i
